executives.name: Rodrigo Barbosa
executives.background: Mr. Barbosa has over 20 years of experience in finance, operations, and business development. He previously served as CFO of Aura Minerals and has held executive positions at various multinational companies.

executives.name: Kleber Cardoso
executives.background: Mr. Cardoso has extensive experience in financial management and the mining industry. He joined Aura in 2017 and has served in various senior financial roles.

executives.name: Tiago Vaz
executives.background: Mr. Vaz is responsible for the company's operations and has a strong background in mining engineering and project management.

board_of_directors.name: Rodrigo Barbosa
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Aura Minerals Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Richmond Fenn
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Fenn has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Freeport-McMoRan.

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Quin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Quin is a geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at Midas Gold and Capstone Mining.

board_of_directors.name: Philip Reade
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Reade is a Managing Director at Northwestern Capital Partners and has extensive experience in investment banking and private equity.

board_of_directors.name: Bruno Serapião
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Serapião is a partner at Northwestern Capital Partners and has significant experience in infrastructure and logistics.

sources.source_description: Aura Minerals Official Website - Management and Board Page
